heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly to partly cloudy, except partly to mostly sunny southeast, and in the St. Lawrence Valley. Chance of a shower or sprinkle near the Québec border. Highs in the upper 60s to lower 70s, with some mid 70s in southeastern valleys, and some mid 60s northeast. West winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s. Patchy valley fog late. Winds becoming light, variable to southwest, except southwest 5 to 10 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Tuesday
text: Partly to mostly sunny. Breezy, with highs in the low to mid 80s. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph and gusting to 25 mph, except gusting to 35 mph near the international border.
